{"title":"","content":[[{"tag":"at","user_id":"@_user_1","user_name":"用户380937","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":" ","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Checkmate Package A 方案内容及所需素材如下：","style":["bold"]},{"tag":"text","text":"Explore Page Banner —— 持续 5 天  ","style":["bold"]},{"tag":"text","text":"素材要求：","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"1 张高清图片（建议不带文字）","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"想在横幅中突出的促销细节（如：优惠、新品、或核心信息）。","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Push Notifications Dedicated —— 1 次","style":["bold"]},{"tag":"text","text":"素材要求：分享关键信息，文案可由 Checkmate 撰写，或自行提供。","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"标题：不超过 36 个字符","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"副标题：不超过 44 个字符","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Logo 会自动显示在 App 内，标题中是否包含品牌名可自行决定。","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"IG Stories —— 2 次","style":["bold"]},{"tag":"text","text":"素材要求：高清、无文字内容的图片。","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"尺寸建议：1080 x 1920 px。","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Static Post","style":["bold"]},{"tag":"text","text":" —— 1 次","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"Short-Form UGC Video","style":["bold"]},{"tag":"text","text":" —— 1 条","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"两种类型的短视频内容可选：","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"产品寄送模式 (Product Seeding)：品牌方提供实物产品供创作者拍摄使用。","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"绿幕展示模式 (Green Screen)：创作者以官网或社交媒体页面为背景进行讲解。","style":[]},{"tag":"text","text":"时间线提示：在风格确认（及收到产品）后，需预留 2 周时间进行制作排期。","style":[]}]]}
